'''âb-w-z''' ('''bawaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoink|zoink]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoink|zoink]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-w-z
|-
! Lemma
| bawaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bawazithi|bawazithi]] || [[word:bawaziji|bawaziji]] || [[word:bawazishi|bawazishi]] || [[word:bawazi|bawazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawazuthuth|bawazuthuth]] || [[word:bawazujuj|bawazujuj]] || [[word:bawazushush|bawazushush]] || [[word:bawaz|bawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawazuthu|bawazuthu]] || [[word:bawazuju|bawazuju]] || [[word:bawazushu|bawazushu]] || [[word:bawazu|bawazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawazufuth|bawazufuth]] || [[word:bawazufuj|bawazufuj]] || [[word:bawazufush|bawazufush]] || [[word:bawazuf|bawazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bawazethe|bawazethe]] || [[word:bawazeje|bawazeje]] || [[word:bawazeshe|bawazeshe]] || [[word:bawaze|bawaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawazothoth|bawazothoth]] || [[word:bawazojoj|bawazojoj]] || [[word:bawazoshosh|bawazoshosh]] || [[word:bawaz|bawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawazotho|bawazotho]] || [[word:bawazojo|bawazojo]] || [[word:bawazosho|bawazosho]] || [[word:bawazo|bawazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawazofoth|bawazofoth]] || [[word:bawazofoj|bawazofoj]] || [[word:bawazofosh|bawazofosh]] || [[word:bawazof|bawazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bawazĂŠthĂŠ|bawazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bawazĂŠjĂŠ|bawazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bawazĂŠshĂŠ|bawazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bawazĂŠ|bawazĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawazathath|bawazathath]] || [[word:bawazajaj|bawazajaj]] || [[word:bawazashash|bawazashash]] || [[word:bawaz|bawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawazatha|bawazatha]] || [[word:bawazaja|bawazaja]] || [[word:bawazasha|bawazasha]] || [[word:bawaza|bawaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawazafath|bawazafath]] || [[word:bawazafaj|bawazafaj]] || [[word:bawazafash|bawazafash]] || [[word:bawazaf|bawazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bawazasha|bawazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobawazasha|gobawazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibawazasha|gokibawazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bawaznĂŒsha|bawaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobawaznknĂŒsha|gobawaznknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibawaznĂŒsha|gokibawaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bawazshĂ«sha|bawazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobawaznkshĂ«sha|gobawaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibawazshĂ«sha|gokibawazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bawazrosha|bawazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobawaznkrosha|gobawaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibawazrosha|gokibawazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bawazmusha|bawazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawaznkmusha|gobawaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawazmusha|gokibawazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bawazsherasha|bawazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobawaznksherasha|gobawaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibawazsherasha|gokibawazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bawazngasha|bawazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobawaznkngasha|gobawaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibawazngasha|gokibawazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bawazyasha|bawazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobawaznkyasha|gobawaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibawazyasha|gokibawazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bawazyamasha|bawazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobawaznkyamasha|gobawaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibawazyamasha|gokibawazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bawaznĂŒshĂ«sha|bawaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobawaznknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobawaznknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibawaznĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibawaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bawaznĂŒrosha|bawaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobawaznknĂŒrosha|gobawaznknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibawaznĂŒrosha|gokibawaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawaznĂŒmusha|bawaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawaznknĂŒmusha|gobawaznknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawaznĂŒmusha|gokibawaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bawazshĂ«nĂŒsha|bawazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobawaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobawaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibawazshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibawazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bawazshĂ«rosha|bawazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobawaznkshĂ«rosha|gobawaznkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibawazshĂ«rosha|gokibawazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawazshĂ«musha|bawazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawaznkshĂ«musha|gobawaznkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawazshĂ«musha|gokibawazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bawazronĂŒsha|bawazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobawaznkronĂŒsha|gobawaznkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibawazronĂŒsha|gokibawazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bawazroshĂ«sha|bawazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobawaznkroshĂ«sha|gobawaznkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibawazroshĂ«sha|gokibawazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawazromusha|bawazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawaznkromusha|gobawaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawazromusha|gokibawazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bawazmunĂŒsha|bawazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobawaznkmunĂŒsha|gobawaznkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibawazmunĂŒsha|gokibawazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bawazmushĂ«sha|bawazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobawaznkmushĂ«sha|gobawaznkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibawazmushĂ«sha|gokibawazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bawazmurosha|bawazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobawaznkmurosha|gobawaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibawazmurosha|gokibawazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bawaz|bawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠz|bĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobawaz|hobawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠwĂŠz|hobĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobawaz|hohobawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠwĂŠz|hohobĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbawaz|nĂŒbawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŒbĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbawaz|nĂŒnĂŒbawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbawaz|nĂŻbawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŻbĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbawaz|nĂŻnĂŻbawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubawaz|lubawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠwĂŠz|lubĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubawaz|lulubawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠwĂŠz|lulubĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libawaz|libawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠwĂŠz|libĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibawaz|lilibawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠwĂŠz|lilibĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobawaz|kobawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠwĂŠz|kobĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobawaz|kokobawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠwĂŠz|kokobĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebawaz|kebawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠwĂŠz|kebĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebawaz|kekebawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠwĂŠz|kekebĂŠwĂŠz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
